since_last: 49% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +4.25%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.33% · BTC -2.76% · Gold +1.08% · Nasdaq100 +0.96%. 49% of 89 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +4.25%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +4.25%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -0.91%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +17.43%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +17.43%, AMBA +12.73%, KLAC +6.42%, MRVL +6.36%, CEVA +6.16%. Laggards: TTD -5.92%, DLR -4.74%, PINS -3.34%, HON -3.15%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +2.35% at $168.05
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +2.35% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
